title: AiAnalysis
description: Structured output contract for the AI Analyzer (Ollama). The AI agent is strictly forbidden from returning free-text; every response MUST validate against this schema.

podName.description: The name of the Kubernetes Pod that was analysed. Must match the podName from the originating KubernetesEvent.

namespace.description: The Kubernetes namespace of the analysed Pod. Must match the namespace from the originating KubernetesEvent.

verdict.description: The AI agent's classification of the Pod's health state.

rootCauseAnalysis.description: A concise, human-readable explanation of the root cause inferred by the AI agent. Must be factual and grounded in the observed Pod state. Maximum 500 characters.

recommendedActions.description: An ordered list of concrete mitigation steps recommended by the AI agent. Each item is a single actionable instruction.
